name: Ebony Credit Solutions (Credit Repair)
description_short: Ebony Credit Solutions offers credit repair services to help consumers dispute errors and negative items on their credit reports.
description_long:
Ebony Credit Solutions is a credit repair company operating under the fix-my-credit category, accessible via phone at 347-404-5753 and online at ebonycredit.com. The company positions itself to help consumers address inaccuracies and negative items that may be damaging their credit profiles.

Based on the available website content, Ebony Credit Solutions provides credit repair services designed to dispute questionable items on credit reports. The company maintains an online booking system for consultations and actively manages customer reviews, with a link to Google Reviews prominently displayed on their homepage, suggesting they track their reputation in the marketplace.

The company's web presence includes educational content related to personal credit topics, as evidenced by their blog posts on FTC regulatory matters. This suggests an effort to position themselves as informed about consumer protection regulations and industry compliance—important considerations for credit repair companies, which operate in a heavily regulated sector under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA).

Without comprehensive service details or customer testimonials visible in the provided website content, consumers should conduct thorough due diligence before engaging. Credit repair companies vary significantly in effectiveness and ethics, and prospective clients should verify licensing, understand what disputes will be filed on their behalf, review pricing structures, and confirm the company's compliance with FTC regulations governing credit repair organizations.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Maintains online booking system for convenient appointment scheduling
Displays Google Reviews link prominently, suggesting transparency about customer feedback
Publishes content on FTC regulations and consumer protection, indicating regulatory awareness
Phone contact available at 347-404-5753 for direct communication
Established web presence with dedicated domain and cookie policy/privacy disclosures
cons: Limited specific service details available on the provided website content
No visible pricing information, fee structures, or service transparency details
No customer testimonials, case studies, or success metrics provided in accessible content
Credit repair category operates under strict FTC regulations (CROA), requiring verification of compliance
No visible information about company credentials, licensing, or industry certifications
best_for: Consumers with inaccuracies or errors on their credit reports who lack time to dispute individually
Those with multiple negative items seeking professional dispute assistance
Individuals in the New York area (347 area code suggests local focus)
diagnosis: Ebony Credit Solutions is positioned as a credit repair service for consumers seeking professional assistance with credit report disputes. However, the publicly available website content provides minimal detail about specific services, pricing, credentials, or outcomes—essential information for evaluating a credit repair company. Prospective clients must independently verify licensing, understand CROA compliance, and confirm the company's legitimacy before engaging.
services: Personal credit advisory content and education
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
